name: Sweetie Pies (Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line cookie sheets with waxed paper.
3. In a double boiler, melt the unsweetened chocolate and the first batch of chocolate chips. Stir frequently with a wooden spoon or wire whisk until creamy and smooth.
4. Pour melted chocolate into a large bowl. Add butter and beat with an electric mixer at medium speed until thoroughly combined.
5. Add sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Beat on medium speed until well blended.
6. Scrape down the sides of the bowl.
7. Add flour, baking soda, and the three types of chocolate chips. Mix at low speed just until combined. The chips should be distributed evenly throughout the dough.
8. Roll a heaping tablespoon of dough into a ball, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter. Place dough balls onto paper-lined pans, 2 inches apart.
9. Flatten each ball to 1/2 inch thickness with the palm of your hand.
10. Bake for 10-12 minutes. Transfer cookies with a spatula to a cool, flat surface.
